subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: A thousand and nine hundred years have they sounded the bell, yet still have they found neither weariness nor fatigue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هزار و نهصد سال است ناقوس میزنند هنوز کلال و ملال پیدا نکرده
subcodes.subjects: @idolatry, @Christ; Christianity, @Christian doctrine and practice, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering; rejection of Christ
